messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed with zero failures; AUTH-ZEN-080 supplies exact activation authority matching all required fields per STD-ZEN-080-P.

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Confirm no latent authority gaps remain

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May clinical operations activate the trial site?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site, protocol, consent, date, and enrollment authority",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED",
    "controlling_source_fact": "AUTH-ZEN-080 provides exact activation authority",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "No open defect; FEAS-ZEN-080 is planning only",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "All elements closed on 2026-06-28"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "AUTH-ZEN-080"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "exact source match",
    "enrollment authority present"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 supplies exact activation authority matching site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 is limited to planning. Boundary is closed per policy STD-ZEN-080-P.",
  "open_blockers": [],
  "verification_verdict": "ALLOW",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
